title: 2D Semiconductor Devices
description: Investigation of transition metal dichalcogenides (TMDs) such as MoS₂, WSe₂, and MoSe₂ for high-performance optoelectronic applications. We explore van der Waals heterostructures and their unique light-matter interactions.

title: Perovskite Optoelectronics
description: Development of halide perovskite-based light-emitting devices and photodetectors. Research focuses on defect engineering, stability enhancement, and integration with 2D materials.

title: Semiconductor Photonic Devices
description: Design and fabrication of photonic structures for enhanced light emission and detection. Topics include microcavity effects, Purcell enhancement, and integrated photonics.
